title: happy Birthday!
description:
This mod will help you celebrate your birthday in minecraft!
He will add "A Hat, a Surprise and a Birthday cake"
Now you can give gifts and put on hats!
body:
that mod will help you celebrate your birthday in minecraft!
He will add "A Hat, a Surprise and a Birthday cake"
Surprice can give you 2 diamond
Prepare a birthday cake and eat it!
Give your friends Hats and put them on together!
Now you can give gifts and put on hats!
